title: Still Posting: Pittsburgh's Most Active Instagram Feeds
subtitle: The minority that are posting, ranked by Instagram momentum
angle: most Pittsburgh small businesses on this index are dormant on Instagram. These are the ones that aren't, ranked by 30-day cadence.
intro:
Hidden Harbor in Squirrel Hill posted twelve times in the last thirty days. It is, by a real margin, the most consistent bar feed in Pittsburgh. Not a single TikTok creator has filmed inside. That distance, between a room that is doing the work on its own feed and a city not yet pointing cameras back at it, is the story this list is about.

Most Pittsburgh small businesses on this index have gone quiet on Instagram. Not slow, quiet. The accounts exist; the posts stopped. The ten below are the exception. Kyo Matcha holds the top cafe slot on the back of cakes and matcha content, though creator volume is still thin, which makes the ranking more fragile than the number suggests. Hop Farm Brewing holds first among breweries with twelve posts a month and a TikTok layer that is essentially one creator and one clip. Page's is here with 87,000 plays driven by other people, and no TikTok account of its own to catch any of it.

The pattern across this list is the same one. Instagram activity alone is enough to separate these feeds from the dormant majority. TikTok is where most of them have left the door open. Issue 02 will track who walks through it.

items.name: Kyo Matcha
items.descriptor: First in Pittsburgh cafes, held by cakes and matcha. Creator volume is still the open question.

featured_tiktok.author: ride_rev_rx

items.name: Spot of Coffee
items.descriptor: Engagement most cafes would envy, capped by a missing website and an uneven posting cadence.

featured_tiktok.caption:
Delicious recent food and drinks I’ve got in Pittsburgh when eating out!! All time favs are @Spot Of Coffee & Alta Via!
#pittsburgh #pittsburghfood #foodie #pitt #thingstodo places to eat in Pittsburgh

items.name: Golden Age Beer Company
items.descriptor: Second in breweries on the beer. Food complaints and a missing video presence are the ceiling.

items.name: Allegheny Coffee & Tea Exchange
items.descriptor: First in Pittsburgh cafes on review depth. One TikTok creator has filmed it so far.

featured_tiktok.author: christinaclothesncoffee

items.name: Hidden Harbor
items.descriptor: First in Pittsburgh bars, with the visual catalog to prove it. No TikTok creator has filed a frame yet.

items.name: Page's
items.descriptor: First in Pittsburgh sweets on 3,145 reviews. The TikTok audience has no account to follow.

items.name: Tazza D'Oro
items.descriptor: Best conversion path in Pittsburgh cafes. The reels are missing and TikTok has one video.

items.name: Jeni's Splendid Ice Creams
items.descriptor: First in Pittsburgh sweets on a full profile and 450 photos. TikTok is the one platform missing.

featured_tiktok.author: soysauceyybae

items.name: Hop Farm Brewing Company
items.descriptor: First in breweries. The TikTok layer is practically empty: one creator, one clip.

items.descriptor: Seventy-fifth in Pittsburgh cafes, with seven creators already filming and no TikTok account to show for it.
